name: TC-31: Add Sales History Record Successfully
description: Inputting a new sales record successfully logs it in the sales history page.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the login page at /login
Type admin@suryaelektrik.com in the email input field
Type password123 in the password input field
Click the Masuk ke Sistem button
Click the Historis Penjualan sidebar navigation item
Click the INPUT PENJUALAN button to open the form modal
Select the target product in the dropdown product selector
Type 25 in the Kuantitas Terjual input field
Select the month from the dropdown selector
Type 2026 in the Tahun input field
Click the Simpan Transaksi button to submit
Verify the modal closes and the sales table updates
Verify the newly added sales entry is listed in the history table
